introduction: A sturdy woman in mud-stained clothing looks up as you approach. Despite obvious exhaustion, her eyes are sharp and vigilant.
"Travelers? Or are you here from the town?" She wipes her hands on her apron. "I'm Marta. I've been trying to keep these people together since... since everything went wrong."
"We were miners, merchants, farmers. Then the tremors started. The attacks. People vanishing in the night. We fled to this clearing, but even here we're not safe."
She gestures to the huddled families. "Brigands raid us every few nights. They know we're desperate. The mayor promised help weeks ago."

options.text: The mayor sent us. We're looking for his family.
Tell me about these brigand raids.

introduction: Marta's expression darkens. "The mayor's wife and daughter? They were here... for a time."
She takes a shaky breath. "Three nights ago, cultists came. Not brigands—these were organized. Robed figures with dark symbols. They took several people, including Mayor Aldric's family."
"We couldn't stop them. They had magic, unnatural strength. Dragged them north, toward those cursed ruins on the hill."
"If you're planning to go after them... you'll need more than courage. Those cultists are dangerous."
"Desperate men who prey on the desperate," Marta spits. "They attack at night, steal our food and supplies. Sometimes they take people—probably sell them to slavers."
"They have a leader, a scarred brute with a greatsword. I've seen him wearing... unusual things. Trinkets, old keys, strange jewelry. Probably looted from their raids."
"We've tried to fight back, but we're miners and farmers, not warriors."
Marta nods as you approach. "Still here, still fighting. What can I tell you?"

options.text: Tell me about the brigand raids.
